name: @vance/facelift-bridge
description: Vance Facelift — thin Capacitor wrapper around the deployed Vance web UI. Native account picker + brain URL switching; the live website handles auth and editors itself.

scripts.cap:add:ios: cap add ios || true; sed -i '' "s/platform :ios, '[0-9.]*'/platform :ios, '17.0'/" ios/App/Podfile && sed -i '' "s/IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET = [0-9.]*;/IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET = 17.0;/g" ios/App/App.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj && cd ios/App && pod install
